basic_details.job_title: NIT Durgapur Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Durgapur (NIT Durgapur)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Durgapur (NIT Durgapur) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Senior Project Associate Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can download the application form from the official website and submit it offline.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Doctoral Degree in Chemical Engineering from a recognized University (Specialization in Membrane synthesis, characterization, modelling and application and membrane process design)
qualification.details: Doctoral Degree in Chemical Engineering from a recognized University (Specialization in Membrane synthesis, characterization, modelling and application and membrane process design)

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://nitdgp.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 08-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NIT Durgapur Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: NIT Durgapur Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://nitdgp.ac.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 08-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Durgapur Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Durgapur Senior Project Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the NIT Durgapur Senior Project Associate position is 08-07-2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Senior Project Associate post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Senior Project Associate post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 57,000 per month.

faq.question: Q3. What is the required qualification for the Senior Project Associate role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Doctoral Degree in Chemical Engineering from a recognized university with specialization in membrane synthesis, characterization, modelling, application, and membrane process design.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Project Associate position?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Senior Project Associate post at NIT Durgapur.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the NIT Durgapur Senior Project Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Senior Project Associate post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Senior Project Associate position will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of NIT Durgapur, the link for which is provided in the Important Links section.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Senior Project Associate is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job is located at the National Institute of Technology Durgapur, Durgapur, West Bengal, with a pincode of 713209.
